meta.poznamky: Seřaď 5 bloků: repeat(6){f40,r60} + penUp + forward(80) + penDown + repeat(6){f40,r60}. Dva pravidelné šestiúhelníky vedle sebe. Start: (100,160) uhel 0.

cms.task_text: Seřaďte bloky tak, aby želva nakreslila [hlp]dva pravidelné šestiúhelníky[/hlp] se stranou 40 bodů vedle sebe.
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="controls_repeat_ext" id="r1" x="20" y="20"><value name="TIMES"><block type="math_number" id="mn1"><field name="NUM">6</field></block></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward" id="f1"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="rg1"><field name="ANGLE">60</field></block></next></block></statement></block><block type="turtle_forward" id="f2" x="300" y="20"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field></block><block type="turtle_pen_down" id="pd1" x="300" y="150"></block><block type="turtle_pen_up" id="pu1" x="20" y="280"></block><block type="controls_repeat_ext" id="r2" x="300" y="280"><value name="TIMES"><block type="math_number" id="mn2"><field name="NUM">6</field></block></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward" id="f3"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="rg2"><field name="ANGLE">60</field></block></next></block></statement></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="controls_repeat_ext" id="r1" x="20" y="20"><value name="TIMES"><block type="math_number" id="mn1"><field name="NUM">6</field></block></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward" id="f1"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="rg1"><field name="ANGLE">60</field></block></next></block></statement><next><block type="turtle_pen_up" id="pu1"><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="f2"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down" id="pd1"><next><block type="controls_repeat_ext" id="r2"><value name="TIMES"><block type="math_number" id="mn2"><field name="NUM">6</field></block></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward" id="f3"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="rg2"><field name="ANGLE">60</field></block></next></block></statement></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
